integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Integrating ZK-Student into your Solana program requires no CPI. You just read the StudentCredential PDA and let Anchor verify it.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: ZK-Student is a student identity protocol on Solana. Students prove they hold a valid DNE or ISIC credential using a ZK proof, and a reusable StudentCredential is stored on-chain. Any Solana program can verify student status with a single account read — no personal data, no ZK knowledge required.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.description: The Anchor program is deployed on Solana devnet at 8GzzGmVbwTZ982GF7kpbchEf2VVv6wWXHZrmtj8dJJ4z.

prover-api.title: Prover API
prover-api.description: The prover server is a Rust HTTP server deployed on AWS EC2.
